title: Better tools
description: A resource pack that makes tools look better!
body:
this resource pack basically make tools look better! if.. the name isnt obvious enough... 
currently this resource pack only change some texture of sword and axe. 
included in the first version:
-wooden axe
-wooden sword
-stone axe
-copper axe
-copper sword
-gold sword (sickle) 
-netherite axe
-netherite sword
